docs.text: Ziqi Zhou（周子奇） M.Eng. student at Department of Computer Science and Technology , Nanjing University , Nanjing, P.R.China, 210023 Email: zhouzq@smail.nju.edu.cn; zqzhou1997@outlook.com Biography Currently, I am a first year master student of Department of Computer Science and Technology in Nanjing University and a member of R&L Group led by Prof. Yang Gao , under the supervision of Associate Prof. Yinghuan Shi . I received my B.Eng. degree in School of Computer Science and Technology in June 2020 from Nanjing Normal University . Main Research Interests Machine Learning Computer Vision Medical Image Analysis Education Experience 2013/09-2016/06 NO.1 High School of Jiangyin Jiangsu 2016/09-2020/06 School of Computer Science and Technology , Nanjing Normal University , Undergraduate student 2020/09-Now Department of Computer Science and Technology , Nanjing University , Master student Selected Publication "*" indicates the equal contribution Cross-Modal Attention-Guided Convolutional Network for Multi-Modal Cardiac Segmentation Ziqi Zhou* , Xinna Guo*, Wanqi Yang, Yinghuan Shi, Luping Zhou, Lei Wang, Ming Yang Machine Learning in Medical Imaging @ MICCAI ( MLMI ), 2019 [ paper ] Correspondence Email: zhouzq@smail.nju.edu.cn; zqzhou1997@outlook.com Office: Room 428, Computer Science Building, Xianlin Campus of Nanjing University Address: State Key Laboratory for Novel Software Technology Nanjing University, Xianlin Campus No.163 Xianlin Avenue, Qixia District, Nanjing 210023, China
